response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise and leadership in software development, with notable experience in open-source projects and full-stack development. However, his German language proficiency is only basic, and his experience in IT architecture and project management is less explicitly highlighted compared to hands-on development roles.
strengths: Extensive experience in full-stack development and open-source technologies, including leadership in projects like GISCollective.
Proven track record of mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and community engagement.
Diverse technical skills spanning multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, Python, etc.) and environments (web, mobile, embedded).
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (B1/B2 level), falling short of the required C1 level.
Limited explicit experience in IT architecture and high-level technical project management, which are key responsibilities for this role.
Most roles emphasize hands-on development rather than strategic leadership or client-facing advisory work.
